content: agent1: implementing case_sensitive param for groupby() filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby/do_groupby_async). Will only touch groupby-related code there; let me know if you're touching that file.

agent1: done with case_sensitive param for sync_do_groupby/do_groupby in src/jinja2/filters.py. Signature is now (environment, value, attribute, default=None, case_sensitive=False). I added logic: expr uses ignore_case postprocess when not case_sensitive, then a final pass re-maps grouper to the real (non-lowercased) attribute value of the first item in each group via a second make_attrgetter call without postprocess. All 837 existing tests still pass. Please add with_counts as a new kwarg after case_sensitive and make sure your output-construction step composes with my final real_expr remap (it happens after the groupby/sort). Ping me if you want the current file content.
